channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: OK Movement Coordinator criticises presidential aide Onanuga over comments on Peter Obi
item.description: The Southwest Zonal Coordinator of the OK Movement, Adefolaseye Adebayo, has openly criticised Bayo Onanuga, the Special Adviser to President Bola Tinubu on Information and Strategy, over his recent c...

item.title: Anthony Hopkins’ Early Years in the British Army Before His Acting Career
item.description: The article explores an often overlooked chapter in the early life of acclaimed actor Anthony Hopkins: his compulsory military service in the British Army during the late 1950s. Before achieving globa...

item.title: New details emerge ahead of Islamabad High Court hearing in One Constitution Avenue project dispute
item.description: As the Islamabad High Court (IHC) prepares to resume hearing on the long-running One Constitution Avenue project dispute, new information has surfaced in the court record revealing key historical and ...

item.title: Augustus Muli Calls for Ukambani Unity and 5-Million Vote Strategy Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: NLP leader Augustus Kyalo Muli has publicly urged Wiper Party leader Stephen Kalonzo Musyoka to rally Ukambani leaders into a united political and development front ahead of the 2027 general elections...

item.title: Gunman shot dead after opening fire near White House security checkpoint; reporter incident caught on camera
item.description: A shooting incident occurred near the White House on Saturday, 23 May, when a man opened fire at a Secret Service security checkpoint located at 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue in Washington, D.C....

item.title: Pura Luka Vega says art and self-expression continue to inspire their fearless advocacy
item.description: Drag artist and LGBTQIA+ figure Pura Luka Vega shared their thoughts on remaining fearless in expressing their creativity and identity through art. In the interview published by ABS-CBN, Vega emphasiz...

item.title: Lucien Lelong and His Role in Preserving Parisian Haute Couture During WWII
item.description: Lucien Lelong (1889–1958) was a prominent French couturier who played a crucial role in preserving the integrity and global leadership of Parisian haute couture during the early to mid-20th century. R...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab Achieves Record Efficiency as Purpose-Built Robotaxi
item.description: Tesla’s upcoming Cybercab robotaxi has been officially certified at 165 Wh/mi, making it the most energy-efficient electric vehicle ever produced, according to reporting from Electrek. Tesla Vice Pres...

item.title: ADC unveils Zakari Mohammed as Kwara State governorship candidate for 2027 elections and presents other nominees
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has announced former House of Representatives member, Zakari Mohammed, as its governorship candidate for the 2027 Kwara State election. Mohammed, who represented ...

item.title: Why Nigerian SMEs Need Strategic Branding to Survive and Grow
item.description: The article explains why many Nigerian SMEs dey struggle because dem no dey take branding seriously. According to the piece, small and medium enterprises contribute heavily to Nigeria’s economy by cre...

item.title: Former Vihiga teacher builds successful career in real estate development after years in teaching and property agency
item.description: Ibrahim Etuku, a man from Bunyore in Vihiga County, has built an inspiring journey from humble beginnings to becoming a respected figure in the real estate sector. After completing his education, he i...

item.title: Mount Costa in Benguet promotes slow tourism through forest gardens and eco-therapy spaces
item.description: Mount Costa in La Trinidad, Benguet is being highlighted as one of the Cordillera region’s leading eco-tourism destinations because of its combination of forest landscapes, themed gardens, conservatio...

item.title: Jem Calder’s debut novel explores modern millennial life and digital-age disconnection
item.description: Jem Calder’s debut novel, I Want You to Be Happy, has been widely discussed as a defining millennial-era story capturing the emotional and cultural landscape of contemporary urban life. The book follo...

item.title: Cricket Australia proposes flexible state-by-state model for potential BBL club sales
item.description: Cricket Australia is developing a revised proposal that would allow individual state cricket associations to independently decide whether and when to sell stakes in their Big Bash League clubs. The pl...

item.title: Abdeslam Ouaddou reflects on difficult Orlando Pirates season after ending 14-year league title drought
item.description: Orlando Pirates coach Abdeslam Ouaddou has suggested that he may leave the club after guiding them to their first Premiership title in 14 years during the 2025/2026 season. Pirates secured the champio...

item.title: Google Launches Optional Disco-Ball App Icons for Pixel Phones After Spotify Trend
item.description: Google has introduced a playful new customization option for Pixel smartphones by releasing disco-ball-themed Android app icons. The feature was announced by Android ecosystem head Sameer Samat, who s...

item.title: Vintage Polaroid Photos of Donna Summer Highlight Her Career and Legacy
item.description: This article from a vintage photography blog presents a collection of Polaroid images featuring Donna Summer, the legendary American singer widely known as the “Queen of Disco.” Alongside the visual f...

item.title: Weekly Roundup of Nuclear, Climate, Geopolitical, and Media-Related News
item.description: This article from the Nuclear News blog presents a broad weekly roundup of stories focused on nuclear energy, climate change, geopolitics, war, media criticism, and social justice issues. The post com...

item.title: Teen Artist Struggles With Pressure to Continue Competitive Water Polo
item.description: In this advice column, a high school student describes her growing emotional conflict between her identity as an artist and the pressure she feels to continue playing competitive water polo. The teena...

item.title: Sibisi leads Orlando Pirates to first league title in 14 years after final-day victory
item.description: Nkosinathi Sibisi has gone from being widely mocked on social media to becoming a league champion and captain of Orlando Pirates, following their long-awaited title triumph. Earlier in the season, cri...
